plugin_desc: MRV OptiDriver optical transmission SNMP child template (enterprise PEN 33). The verified profile is a clean baseline built on standard MIB-II and IF-MIB ifXTable; no stable vendor-specific row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan, power or optical health gauges are confirmed from MRV-IN-REACH-SYSTEM-MIB facts in this worktree. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate traffic while this plugin provides the MRV collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template. Supported brands/models — MRV OptiDriver ROADM and optical transmission devices.
name: Transmission
